title: Onboarding v2 PRD
body:
# Onboarding v2 PRD

## Overview
Replace the legacy onboarding flow with a streamlined first-run experience.

## Goals
- Increase completion rate to 80%
- Reduce drop-off on permissions screen

## User stories
- As a new user, I can complete onboarding in under 60 seconds.
- As a new user, I understand why permissions are requested.

## Acceptance criteria
- Given a fresh install, when the user opens the app, then onboarding starts within 1 second.
- Given permissions denied, when the user retries, then a fallback path is offered.
- Given onboarding complete, when the user relaunches, then onboarding does not repeat.

## Edge cases
- Offline during onboarding shows cached content.
- Deep link into onboarding mid-flow resumes correctly.
- Accessibility: VoiceOver reads all primary CTAs.

## Analytics
- onboarding_start, onboarding_step, onboarding_complete
- Funnel by step with 24h retention cohort

## Rollout
- 5% internal dogfood → 20% beta → 100% over 2 weeks
- Feature flag `onboarding_v2_enabled` with kill switch

## Ownership
- PM: Alice Chen
- Engineering: Mobile Platform
- QA: Release QA pod
